memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GameSessionID, FString const &MemberID, EAccelByteV2SessionMemberStatus Status, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateMemberStatus

briefdescription.para: Update a member of this session's status with the one provided. Requires permission 'ADMIN:NAMESPACE:{namespace}:SESSION:GAME' to be set with the 'UPDATE' action.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the session.
ID of the member to update status for
Status to set for this member
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: The query parties request body.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.

Pagination offset. Default 0.
Pagination limit. Default 20.

The ID of the user to kick

This will be called if the operation failed.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GameSessionID, bool bDSSessionReady, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: SendDSSessionReady

briefdescription.para: Inform session service that current DS session is ready receiving client travel. This needed if session template used for this game session enable the dsManualSetReady flag.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the game session that claimed the DS.
flag indicating the DS session ready or not.
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsV2SessionRecentPlayers > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: GetRecentPlayers

briefdescription.para: Query recently met users in a game session.

parameterdescription.para: Target recent player User Id
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.
Number of recent players to request, maximum value is 200.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsV2SessionRecentPlayers > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20)
memberdef.name: GetRecentTeamPlayers

briefdescription.para: Query user's recent player who were on the same team.

parameterdescription.para: Target recent player User Id
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
This will be called if the operation failed.
Number of recent players to request, maximum value is 200.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the session to update
Structure describing the DS information to update with
This will be called if the operation succeeded.
